feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Space Between Us
entry.summary:
Author: ReyloTrash2187

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 220,793Chapters: 36/?Kudos: 1,130

Summary: Arthur Pendragon has spent his whole life untouched—by kindness, by desire, or anything resembling real intimacy. It never mattered. Not until a certain annoying manservant came to Camelot—Merlin—who disregarded all strict royal etiquette and showed no restraint when it came to sudden, reckless displays of affection. Now, there’s something impossible in the space between them, something Arthur doesn’t know how to name—only that he aches to close the distance.*A slow-burn touched-starved Arthur Pendragon story.*Guys, there was only one bed.Guys, some obscure quest in the cold far-up mountains made them "huddle for warmth".Guys, they might give in to this farm fantasy of theirs.Can't I just put all the tropes in there?This fic is rated MSI for Maximum Self Indulgence.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Found a place so safe
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,610Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 12

Summary: It had been a week since Morgana returned to Camelot. A week of smiling at Uther. A week of playing the role of the perfect Lady the King had tried to mould her into. A week of reconnecting with Arthur after years of keeping him at arm’s length. She found that he was not the mirror of Uther she had once thought him to be. For the first time in a long while, she understood what Merlin saw in him. She had had her doubts, but now she was sure of it. Arthur could be a great King someday, but he needed all the help he could get, and one part of helping him was telling him the truth.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 359,486Chapters: 76/110Kudos: 3,409

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: If Things Were Different
entry.summary:
Author: PratWithAHeart

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,047Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 20

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, the destiny of a great king and a free land rests on the shoulders of a young boy. This is a story where the young warlock can feel a dangerous presence lurking within the kingdom's walls, but such a threat has not yet been identified.A story where a recently rescued young woman befriends Merlin. The two share a gift which automatically binds them together as close allies. A bond that Merlin could never share with the Prince of Camelot.A story where both Merlin and Arthur discover their own feelings for each other.A story where two men are stupidly infatuated with the other, but neither notice how much they each stare at the other so longingly.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: there’s an open door that can lead me to forever
entry.summary:
Author: mrsrumbles

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,349Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 31

Summary: Arthur grows up beside Merlin as an abandoned orphan in Ealdor. When Camelot’s knights come to bring him home and Arthur learns who he really is, he has to decide whether or not being a prince is something he wants.

entry.title: Arthur's Return
entry.summary:
Author: RoyallyKikiPendragon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,949Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 0

Summary: Set in the modern world. Merlin has been waiting 1500 years to see his world again. One day when his hope seems lost, Morgana, Lancelot, Leon, Gwaine, Percival and Mordred appear on his land. As he tries to get them settled the familiar sounds of Arthurs chainmail clanking breaks through. What new threats happen now? What new adventures?

entry.summary:
Author: RoyallyKikiPendragon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,873Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 2

Summary: Merlin and Arthur of tired of hiding their relationship, and of Uther's meddling, so they get married in secret, along with Morgana and Gwen. But as the secrets to their marriage comes to light, the looming gloom of Uther's death, and hope for the future, what threats will come about

entry.title: Accidentally My Companion
entry.summary:
Author: Nakyrah

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 346,893Chapters: 104/?Kudos: 7,814

Summary: After Arthur disobeyed his father and retrieved the Mortaeus flower for Merlin's cure, Arthur's frantic pleading to save Merlin led to a misunderstanding that actually convinced Uther to take the flower to Gaius.Now all Arthur has to do is explain to Merlin why Uther thinks they are lovers.And while Uther is supportive of the relationship, he requires it kept secret. But in his paranoia, Uther misinterprets every innocent interaction between the two as something far more intimate, to the embarrassment of everyone involved.And then the knights begin showing up...Update 27/04/2024: This is long and in-process. So consider a break between story arcs!Arc 1 - (chapters 1-32, 90k words) What happens when you accidentally tell your father you're gay and in love with Merlin and he ships it hard? You make it true.Arc 2 - (chapters 33-70, 110k words) What happens when your father sends you to court someone you have no interest in? Side quests and Gwaine.Arc 3 - (chapters 71+, in progress) What happens when your father invites every eligible woman to Camelot so you can find your wife like you promised in exchange for saving Merlin? Chaos.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Different Destiny: The Outlaw Prince
entry.summary:
Author: tansyuduri

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 121,443Chapters: 25/25Kudos: 272

Summary: When Merlin's magic is exposed shortly before season 2 starts, the path of destiny starts changing forever. Now on the run with Arthur, Morgana, and Gwen. Merlin hopes to convince Arthur that magic is totally good instead of him and Morgana just being an exception. Morgana, meanwhile, hopes to convince him to usurp his father. As allies are gathered and Arthur realizes the injustice in his kingdom, it looks more and more like he will have to act in a drastic way. A way he dreads.   Meanwhile, Arthur and Merlin are growing closer and closer and might just have feelings for each other. Something they probably should be better about realizing, considering the example of Gwen and Morgana right next to them.   In a land of myth and a time of magic, the destiny of a great kingdom now rests on the shoulders of four, their names: Merlin, Arthur, Guinevere, and Morgana

entry.summary:
Author: definitely_not_quackers

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,490Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 8

Summary: Merlin couldn't breatheHe couldn't moveHe could barely hearWas this an illness? An injury?He wishes he knewIf only the world would stop spinning just long enough that he could look around...   Merlin isn't having a fun time Author tortures Merlin (again) This is our first big fic so please be kind

entry.title: You were the one to teach me how to use knives: Vol 5
entry.summary:
Author: Obsessedwithfanfiction

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,472Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Morgana's memory curse is still in place, but Leon's no longer the only person suspicious of her. Gwen's got a mystery to solve and a long-lost brother to deal with. Morgana's determined to get closer to Merlin again to try and find out how long he's been hiding his magic from her. Meanwhile Merlin's just flattered to be receiving a Lady's attention, though with Gwaine coming back into his life, that might not be the only attention he's receiving. And Arthur's struggling his way back through his character growth and what kind of King he wants to be...

  • I am finally BACK baby!!!
  • In NZ
  • living my best life
  • Do I have a solid internet connection?
  • no!
  • Do I have a job?
  • Nope!
  • Have I finally relaxed maybe a single inch?
  • MAYBE!
  • Am I still obsessed with this ridiculous show and how much they all love each other in new and tragic ways?
  • Hell yes!
  • Fix-It
  • Series 2 onwards rewrite
  • Pls read the other parts first or this will make no sense
  • What if BBC's Merlin had emotional catharsis?
  • And consistency?
  • And a head writer who cared more about all these characters having long conversations with each other
  • Than actually advancing the plot
  • Ofc everyone is still in love with Merlin
  • And also Gwen
  • Guys I hate to jinx it but I think this is finally the part where the title should make sense
  • don't quote me though
  • No beta we die like Uther should have done seasons before he did
  • did ya miss me
  • I am going to try and update every 3 weeks ish on a Friday but it will be dependent on internet connection
  • Everyone go support your local libraries
  • They're where I'm writing in now

entry.title: ̶I̶ ̶L̶o̶v̶e̶ ̶Y̶o̶u̶ I Hate You!
entry.summary:
Author: Larluce

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,301Chapters: 12/13Kudos: 190

Summary: Safe. He is safe. The phantom pain recedes, replaced by the solidity of her arms, the softness of her gown. The cruel, laughing faces of his friends are gone and Morgana is here. She came for him. She saved him. He is not alone anymore. OR Morgana takes Merlin instead of Gwen to the Dark Tower.   Mostly a transcription of my tumblr posts. Written in a mix of novel and script format. Beta Yess_Ulloa ❤️

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 109,345Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 95

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: how to become a warlock of legend
entry.summary:
Author: sleepygecko

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,636Chapters: 27/29Kudos: 114

Summary: The greatest warlock of all time may have lived in the Middle Ages, but he was not born into them. Rather, he was born in 1995. It was theorized that the reason for this was so he could benefit from a full modern education before stepping back in time to complete his destiny.

entry.title: That Funny Feeling
entry.summary:
Author: TwistedWizard345

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,838Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 18

Summary: When two nobles arrive in Camelot, everything seems normal. However, Merlin quickly finds out they are not who they say they are and assumes they have come to assassinate the king (or his prince). Can he and Arthur stop them before they accomplish their true goal? More importantly, can they stay in one piece long enough to do so?

entry.title: The Absolution of the Son
entry.summary:
Author: LadyWhistleClown

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,358Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 77

Summary: Arthur is angry when he learns that he is born of magic and that his Father sacrificed his Mother so he could have an heir. In this version of events, Merlin doesn't tell Arthur that Morgause lied to him. Arthur must confront his Father and face Camelot's history of discriminatory anti-magic policies head on, including his own role in them. All while he feels himself slowly drawn closer and closer to his manservant Merlin. Meanwhile, Merlin must continue to keep his magic secret and work in the shadows for the better future with Arthur he's been promised is his destiny.
